paragraph: These sticky notes feature 2X the sticking power. They also stick and re-stick - allowing you to move your notes with you throughout your day. Keep your ideas across your notebooks, classroom books, calendars or other documents. No tape or tacks are needed with adhesive notes, saving you money and time on office products or school supplies. A great memo pad, these are ideal for using for notes or reminders to yourself or others. Post-it Super Sticky Notes are the perfect solution for shopping lists, reminders, notes on computer screens, time tracking, to-do lists, marking cables, color-coding documents, reminding kids to do chores, storyboarding, scratch paper and agile processing. Each notes sheet is approximately 3 in. x 3 in., with 70 sheets per pad and 8 sticky note pads per pack. These colorful sticky notes include assorted bright colors including blue, purple, red, orange, yellow, and green. All Post-it Notes are sourced from certified, renewable and responsibly managed forests, and all Post-it Notes are recyclable, so you can recycle them when they are no longer needed.

headliner: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind our coffee. We work alongside farmers who’ve cultivated coffee for centuries. expandedDescr: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind every perfect cup of coffee. But every story begins the same — with farmers. The true magic of coffee begins in the soil. That’s why we work alongside farmers like Rafael Costa, whose family has cultivated coffee for centuries, passing down knowledge as rich as the soil itself. Together, we support practices that advance soil conservation. Healthier soil can foster stronger, more resilient coffee plants, leading to better harvests. All while bringing you the bold, complex flavors of Dark Magic. As deep as the night itself, the intense taste of this extra bold blend is enlivened by notes of dried fruit and bittersweet dark chocolate. Dark Magic is Certified Orthodox Union Kosher and grown and sold in adherence to credible sourcing programs that align with our company’s Responsible Sourcing Guidelines. These single serve K-Cup pods are compatible with all Keurig single serve coffee makers. Each K-Cup pod is filled with the freshest dark roast ground coffee and brews a flavorful cup of coffee every time. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done, please empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in many communities.

paragraph: Target tough mold and mildew stains with CloroxPro Tilex Disinfecting Instant Mold and Mildew Remover. Using the power of Clorox Bleach, this disinfectant spray kills 99.9% of germs (1), including the COVID-19 virus (2) and cleaner eliminates tough mold and mildew stains without scrubbing on hard nonporous surfaces. Safe for use on kitchen and bathroom surfaces, this Clorox spray cleans and whitens tile and grout, so you can use it on counters, sinks, tubs, showers and backsplashes. It even prevents the regrowth of mold and mildew for up to 4 weeks and is ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities. (1) Staphylococcus aureus, Salmonella enterica, Trichophyton interdigitale (Athlete’s Foot Fungus) and SARS-CoV-2. (2) Kills Sars-CoV-2 on hard, nonporous surfaces. (3) Follow disinfection directions.
bullets: KILLS 99.9% OF GERMS (1): CloroxPro Tilex Disinfecting Instant Mold and Mildew Remover Spray kills 99.9% of bacteria and COVID-19 virus (2) and removes mold, mildew and bacteria as it cleans (3); Package may vary
MOLD and MILDEW STAIN REMOVER: This CloroxPro disinfectant cleaner eliminates tough mold and mildew stains without scrubbing on hard nonporous surfaces
TILE AND GROUT CLEANER: Cleans and whitens tile and grout, making it the perfect multi surface cleaner for kitchen and bathroom surfaces like counters, sinks and tubs
PREVENTS REGROWTH FOR UP TO 4 WEEKS: This Clorox mold and mildew spray uses the power of Clorox Bleach to target the regrowth of mold and mildew for up to 4 weeks
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: From CloroxPro, ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, busy healthcare environments and other commercial facilities
headliner: CloroxPro Tilex Disinfecting Instant Mold and Mildew Remover Spray kills 99.9% of germs (1) and cleans and whitens tile and grout.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: DIRECTIONS FOR USE: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. AVOID PROLONGED BREATHING OF VAPOR. Use in well-ventilated areas. Open windows and turn on fans before use. If the vapors bother you, leave the room while this product is working. TO REMOVE MILDEW STAINS: Turn sprayer nozzle to SPRAY position. Spray, wait until stains disappear and rinse. Heavy mildew buildup may require longer contact time or two cleanings.

Ingredients: ACTIVE INGREDIENT: Sodium Hypochlorite: 2.4%; OTHER INGREDIENTS: 97.6%; TOTAL: 100.0%; (Yields 2.28% available chlorine)

Caution Statement: PRECAUTIONARY STATEMENTS: HAZARDS TO HUMANS AND DOMESTIC ANIMALS. WARNING: Causes substantial but temporary eye injury. Do not get in eyes or on clothing. Wear safety glasses. Avoid contact with skin. Harmful if inhaled. Avoid breathing spray mist. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Remove and wash contaminated clothing before reuse. For sensitive skin or prolonged use, wear rubber gloves.

paragraph: The Rocketbook Wave smart reusable notebook provides the freedom and versatility of a traditional pen and paper notebook, while instantly blasting your notes and ideas into the cloud using your smartphone. Although it feels like a traditional notebook, when you use Pilot FriXion pens with the Wave notebook, you can erase your notes using your microwave oven and reuse your notebook. We designed this microwave-to-reuse notebook with real paper to give you a natural writing experience and a quick way to erase all your pages at once. It’s also kind of fun to tell people that we microwave our notebooks! Blast your handwritten notes to popular cloud services like Google Drive, Dropbox, Evernote, box, OneNote, Slack, iCloud, iMessage, email and more using the free Rocketbook application for iOS and Android. The app's OCR functions can also automatically name your files and transcribe your notes to text!

paragraph: The j5create 65W GaN PD USB Type-C slim two-port charger can simultaneously charge two USB Type-C devices. The charger uses GaN technology which enables it to deliver a significant amount of power in a small package. Both USB Type-C ports support Power Delivery 3.0/2.0 technology. When using just one of the ports, the first port supports up to 65W, enabling laptops, tablets, and mobile devices to charge at the fastest rates possible, while the second port supports up to 20W. When both ports are being used, the power output distributes 45W and 20W, still amounting to a total of 65W. With the slim design, the charger is easily portable by just sliding it into your pocket or reducing the gap between the wall and the table or cupboard. Surge, overcharging, overcurrent, and overheating protection are all included.
bullets: Ultracompact and portable two-port GaN charger can simultaneously charge two USB Type-C devices at the same time
Quickly charges MacBook, Chromebook, iPad, iPhone, and many other devices
Designed to provide 65W of power
Input voltage: 100-240VAC at 50-60Hz, 1.5A (maximum)
USB Type-C output: 5V/3A, 9V/3A, 12V/3A, 15V/3A, 20V/3.25A (output 1, 65W max), 5V/3A, 9V/2.22A, 12V/1.67A (output 2, 20W max)
Equipped with 2 x USB Type-C ports
Charges efficiently, is compact, and utilizes advanced GaN technology
When using both ports simultaneously, the USB Type-C ports provide up to 45W And 20W of fast charging
Surge, overcharging, overcurrent, and overheating protection ensure safe charging
USB Type-C port supports PD 3.0/PPS/QC 2.0/QC 3.0/FCP/AFC/AP 2.4/BC 1.2
Features foldable charging plugs, meaning you can take this charger anywhere without sacrificing quality or power
Built-in intelligent IC to automatically identify devices
Comes in white
2-year manufacturer limited warranty
⚠ WARNING: Cancer and Reproductive Harm - www.P65Warnings.ca.gov.

paragraph: Charge your USB-C powered devices and a USB mobile device simultaneously with this j5create USB-C super charger. With the Power Delivery 3.0/2.0 technology, it can supply power of 5V/3A, 9V/3A, 12V/3A, 15V/3A, and 20V/4.5A to your USB-C devices. Perfect for Apple MacBook, iPhone X/8/8 Plus, Nintendo Switch, Nexus 5X, Nexus 6P, and more. The JUP2290 is equipped with an attached USB-C cable and a USB Type-A port. You can now charge your mobile device without powering up your laptop/tablet.
bullets: Universal charger provides up to 100W fast-charging power for two devices
Main body dimensions: 1.29"H x 2.32"W x 5"D; cable length: 47.24"
Features USB Type-C with Power Delivery 3.0 and USB Type-A fast-charging ports
Compatible with any USB-powered device
Provides 5V/3A, 9V/3A, 12V/3A, 15V/3A, and 20V/4.5A via USB Type-C and 5V/2.4A via USB Type-A power outputs
Built‐in intelligent IC to automatically identify the connected devices
Automatically balances output when charging two devices at once
Supplies up to 87W of charging power and up to 12W for the USB Type-A port when charging two devices at once
Power Delivery 3.0 provides both upstream and downstream charging when used with a USB Type-C multi-adapter
Surge, overcharging, overcurrent, and overheating protection to ensure safe charging

paragraph: AirPods Pro (2nd generation) with MagSafe Charging Case (USB-C) deliver up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation, with Transparency mode that enables you to hear the world around you. Adaptive Audio that dynamically tailors noise control to your environment. Conversation Awareness helps lower media volume and enhance the voices in front of you while you’re interacting with others. A single charge delivers up to 6 hours of battery life. And Touch control lets you easily adjust volume with a swipe. The MagSafe Charging Case is a marvel on its own with Precision Finding, built-in speaker, and lanyard loop. The upgraded H2 chip powers smarter noise cancellation and three-dimensional sound. Adaptive EQ tunes music to your ears in real time to deliver crisp, clean high notes and deep, rich bass in stunning clarity. AirPods Pro when paired with Apple Vision Pro deliver Lossless Audio with ultra-low latency, for an unprecedented sound experience. Communicating at industry-shattering speed and unlocking a revolutionary new format rendering pure, uncompressed sound in real time. Active Noise Cancellation removes twice as much unwanted noise, so nothing interrupts your listening during a commute and when you need to focus. Transparency mode reduces and adjusts down the intensity of loud noises at 48,000 times per second, so you can comfortably hear the world around you. And Adaptive Audio¹⁶ dynamically blends Transparency mode with Active Noise Cancellation to deliver the best listening experience for you in any environment.
bullets: 1 Pair of Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with MagSafe Charging Case (USB‑C)
Up to 6 hours of listening time and Up to 30 hours of total listening time with the MagSafe Charging Case and Active Noise Cancellation on

Quick access to Siri by saying “Hey Siri”

Find My with proximity view for AirPods Pro and Precision Finding for charging case

paragraph: The j5create 65W GaN PD USB Type-C slim two-port charger can simultaneously charge two USB Type-C devices. The charger uses GaN technology which enables it to deliver a significant amount of power in a small package. Both USB Type-C ports support Power Delivery 3.0/2.0 technology. When using just one of the ports, the first port supports up to 65W, enabling laptops, tablets, and mobile devices to charge at the fastest rates possible, while the second port supports up to 20W. When both ports are being used, the power output distributes 45W and 20W, still amounting to a total of 65W. With the slim design, the charger is easily portable by just sliding it into your pocket or reducing the gap between the wall and the table or cupboard. Surge, overcharging, overcurrent, and overheating protection are all included.

Featuring two layers of extra leak protection and RipGuard technology, these trash bags guard against punctures and tears, and trap liquids in the bag so you can put your most demanding trash up for the challenge. Let the stretchable strength of Glad handle the toughest messes your business encounters and then some. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source. These wireless earbuds use immersive sound to bring the music from inside your head – right in front of you. And for the noises you don’t want to hear, the QC Ultra Earbuds offer world-class noise cancelation. The CustomTune technology analyzes your ear’s shape and adapts the sound and noise cancelling to it. The innovation doesn’t just stop at the premium sound, the design of these in-ear headphones is a one-of-a-kind experience too. You get nine combinations of eartip and stability band sizes to choose from. And up to six hours of play time (up to 4 hours with Immersive Audio)* keeps your favorite music playing as long as you want. The included case holds up to three additional charges. Connect to your devices with advanced Bluetooth 5.3 and keep track of what you have paired in the Bose Music app. It also walks you through setup, lets you customize a shortcut, and access Adjustable EQ settings.

paragraph: Glad ForceFlex Tall Drawstring Trash Bags are designed with stretchable strength to handle the heaviest loads without tearing. The ForceFlex technology delivers extra toughness as it flexes and expands around sharp edges and heavy loads without ripping. Featuring two layers of extra leak protection and RipGuard technology, these trash bags guard against punctures and tears, and trap liquids in the bag so you can put your most demanding trash up for the challenge. Let the stretchable strength of Glad handle the toughest messes your business encounters and then some. The Grips The Can Drawstring ensures that the bag stays in place, until you are ready to take it out. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. CloroxPro, where clean means everything.

Usage Directions: Lift the trash bag from the container by pulling the drawstrings on either side of the bag. Knot the drawstrings for added security. Carry the bag by the drawstring and toss into garbage.

paragraph: The j5create USB Type-C 100W synchronization and charging cable is a high-speed cable that is great for charging USB Type-C devices. The cable features a reversible USB Type-C connector on each side. The power cable supports Power Delivery and data transfer between smartphones, tablets, and laptops. It supports speeds up to 480Mbps and an output of 5A. With a double-braided polyester cover, the exterior is abrasion-resistant, reducing fraying and increasing the life span.
bullets: High-speed cable great for charging USB Type-C devices
Cable length is 5.9'
Contains two USB Type-C male connectors
USB Type-C connector is protected by a metal casing and dual-layer molding to prevent damage from bending and twisting; cable jacket is made of PVC with plastic enclosure
Delivers transfer speeds up to 480Mbps
Supports up to 20V/5A 100W charging for all USB Type-C devices, including phones, tablets, and laptops
Supports Power Delivery and Qualcomm quick charge
Built-in E-marker chip ensures safe and stable 100W fast charging
This cable is not intended for displays
Shield-braid and metalized mylar shielding protects the cable from external electromagnetic interference
Comes in black with orange accents
1-year manufacturer limited warranty
⚠ WARNING: Cancer and Reproductive Harm - www.P65Warnings.ca.gov

paragraph: AirPods Pro (2nd generation) with MagSafe Charging Case (USB-C) deliver up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation, with Transparency mode that enables you to hear the world around you. Adaptive Audio that dynamically tailors noise control to your environment. Conversation Awareness helps lower media volume and enhance the voices in front of you while you’re interacting with others. A single charge delivers up to 6 hours of battery life. And Touch control lets you easily adjust volume with a swipe. The MagSafe Charging Case is a marvel on its own with Precision Finding, built-in speaker, and lanyard loop. The upgraded H2 chip powers smarter noise cancellation and three-dimensional sound. Adaptive EQ tunes music to your ears in real time to deliver crisp, clean high notes and deep, rich bass in stunning clarity. AirPods Pro when paired with Apple Vision Pro deliver Lossless Audio with ultra-low latency, for an unprecedented sound experience. Communicating at industry-shattering speed and unlocking a revolutionary new format rendering pure, uncompressed sound in real time. Active Noise Cancellation removes twice as much unwanted noise, so nothing interrupts your listening during a commute and when you need to focus. Transparency mode reduces and adjusts down the intensity of loud noises at 48,000 times per second, so you can comfortably hear the world around you. And Adaptive Audio¹⁶ dynamically blends Transparency mode with Active Noise Cancellation to deliver the best listening experience for you in any environment.

paragraph: AirPods Pro (2nd generation) with MagSafe Charging Case (USB-C) deliver up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation, with Transparency mode that enables you to hear the world around you. Adaptive Audio that dynamically tailors noise control to your environment. Conversation Awareness helps lower media volume and enhance the voices in front of you while you’re interacting with others. A single charge delivers up to 6 hours of battery life. And Touch control lets you easily adjust volume with a swipe. The MagSafe Charging Case is a marvel on its own with Precision Finding, built-in speaker, and lanyard loop. The upgraded H2 chip powers smarter noise cancellation and three-dimensional sound. Adaptive EQ tunes music to your ears in real time to deliver crisp, clean high notes and deep, rich bass in stunning clarity. AirPods Pro when paired with Apple Vision Pro deliver Lossless Audio with ultra-low latency, for an unprecedented sound experience. Communicating at industry-shattering speed and unlocking a revolutionary new format rendering pure, uncompressed sound in real time. Active Noise Cancellation removes twice as much unwanted noise, so nothing interrupts your listening during a commute and when you need to focus. Transparency mode reduces and adjusts down the intensity of loud noises at 48,000 times per second, so you can comfortably hear the world around you. And Adaptive Audio¹⁶ dynamically blends Transparency mode with Active Noise Cancellation to deliver the best listening experience for you in any environment.
bullets: 1 Pair of Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with MagSafe Charging Case (USB‑C)
Up to 6 hours of listening time and Up to 30 hours of total listening time with the MagSafe Charging Case and Active Noise Cancellation on
Active Noise Cancellation reduces unwanted background noise
Adaptive Transparency lets outside sounds in while reducing loud environmental noise
Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you
Multiple ear tips (XS, S, M, L)
Touch control lets you swipe to adjust volume, press to direct media playback, answer or end calls, and press and hold to switch between listening modes
Sweat and water resistant for AirPods Pro and charging case
Quick access to Siri by saying “Hey Siri”
Easy setup, in-ear detection, and automatic switching between devices
Audio Sharing between two sets of AirPods on your iPhone, iPad, iPod touch, or Apple TV
Find My with proximity view for AirPods Pro and Precision Finding for charging case

paragraph: Take a small break from your workday with these 100% Colombian coffee pods. The medium-roast beans offer rich, smooth flavor and an inviting aroma, while the premeasured pods take the guesswork out of making the perfect cup of coffee. These Keurig K-Cup Cafe Bustelo coffee pods work with Keurig brewing machines for fast, easy preparation.

headliner: Relax with a delicious hot beverage when you prepare these Keurig K-Cup Cafe Bustelo 100% Colombian coffee pods.
expandedDescr:
Serve Yourself a Cup of Convenience
Keeping the coffee pot full can be labor-intensive and messy. But with Keurig® K-Cup® pods, it's neat and simple. One K-Cup® pod makes one cup of coffee, and there are no loose grounds or filters to deal with.

Brewing Options
With each pod, you can make a single 6, 8, 10 or 12 ounce cup of coffee, depending on the Keurig® K-Cup® brewing system used. Choose the correct setting on the brewer to get the right strength brew for your particular coffee mug. Your hot coffee will be perfectly brewed in moments.

Instantly Brew Single-Serve Beverages with Keurig® K-Cup® Pods
Brewing beverages individually with Keurig® K-Cup® pods means you and your employees can spend less time reheating and replacing water in coffee pots and traditional coffee brewers. Your single-serve Keurig® brewing system heats up quickly, so you'll have a hot beverage ready without a lengthy wait time. Stock Keurig K-Cup® pods in your office kitchen or break room so employees can prepare individual cups of coffee at work instead of heading out to the local coffee shop when the urge for coffee hits.

expandedDescr:
Serve Yourself a Cup of Convenience
Keeping the coffee pot full can be labor-intensive and messy. But with Keurig® K-Cup® pods, it's neat and simple. One K-Cup® pod makes one cup of coffee, and there are no loose grounds or filters to deal with.

Brewing Options
With each pod, you can make a single 6, 8, 10 or 12 ounce cup of coffee, depending on the Keurig® K-Cup® brewing system used. Choose the correct setting on the brewer to get the right strength brew for your particular coffee mug. Your hot coffee will be perfectly brewed in moments.

Instantly Brew Single-Serve Beverages with Keurig® K-Cup® Pods
Brewing beverages individually with Keurig® K-Cup® pods means you and your employees can spend less time reheating and replacing water in coffee pots and traditional coffee brewers. Your single-serve Keurig® brewing system heats up quickly, so you'll have a hot beverage ready without a lengthy wait time. Stock Keurig K-Cup® pods in your office kitchen or break room so employees can prepare individual cups of coffee at work instead of heading out to the local coffee shop when the urge for coffee hits.

paragraph: The HP Color LaserJet Pro MFP 3301fdw delivers vibrant laser-quality color and powerful all-in-one print, scan, copy and fax productivity. Fast and effortless with self-healing wireless and advanced features for small teams.
bullets: PERFECT FOR OFFICE – Print, scan and copy professional-quality color documents and reports. Auto 2-sided printing/scanning and auto document feeder for fast scan/copy, plus fax. Perfect for up to 7 people.

STAYS CONNECTED – Reliable Wi-Fi automatically reconnects to stay online and ready to print.

Realistic Sound
30mm diameter dynamic dome driver units in each cushioned ear cup of the Sony MDR-ZX110 Stereo Headphones produce sound with full bass, lively midrange, and clear highs. Convenient Comfort

Travel Friendly
These headphones don't need batteries or recharging to function, making them worry-free travel accessories. The 2.5mm audio jack on Sony MDR-ZX110 Stereo Headphones is compatible with mobile devices, computers, and USB devices alike.

Package Contents
